parameters.name: radiusunit
parameters.label: Radius Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotates the shape by the specified number of degrees.

parameters.name: centerunit
parameters.label: Center Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: justifyh
parameters.label: Justify Horizontal
parameters.description: Specify the horizontal alignment of the circle.

parameters.name: justifyv
parameters.label: Justify Vertical
parameters.description: Specify the vertical alignment of the circle.

parameters.name: fillalpha
parameters.label: Fill Alpha
parameters.description: Alpha of the fill color.

parameters.name: borderalpha
parameters.label: Border Alpha
parameters.description: Alpha of the border color.

parameters.name: bgalpha
parameters.label: Background Alpha
parameters.description: Alpha of the background color.

parameters.name: borderwidth
parameters.label: Border Width
parameters.description: Width of the border to draw on the shape.

parameters.name: borderwidthunit
parameters.label: Border Width Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: borderoffset
parameters.label: Border Offset
parameters.description: Value from 0 to 1 indicating the fraction of the border that extends beyond the radius of the shape. Effectively sets the radius to .

parameters.name: antialias
parameters.label: Anti-Alias
parameters.description: When on, the shape will be anti-aliased.

parameters.name: softness
parameters.label: Softness
parameters.description: Specifies the amount that the background color should be blended into the shape.

parameters.name: softnessunit
parameters.label: Softness Unit
parameters.description: Select the units for this parameter from Pixels, Fraction (0-1), Fraction Aspect (0-1 considering aspect ratio).

parameters.name: ispolygon
parameters.label: Polygon
parameters.description: When on, a polygon will be drawn. Otherwise a circle is drawn.

parameters.name: sides
parameters.label: Sides
parameters.description: When drawing a polygon, this corresponds to the number of sides the polygon should have.

parameters.name: operand
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose which composite operation is performed from this menu. Search the web for 'blend modes' for more detailed information on the effects of each type.

parameters.name: swaporder
parameters.label: Swap Order
parameters.description: Swaps the order of the composite with the input.

parameters.name: centery
parameters.label: Centery
parameters.description: Coordinates of the center of the shape. (0,0) corresponds to a perfectly centered shape.

parameters.name: combineinput
parameters.label: Combineinput
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: endarcangle
parameters.label: Endarcangle
parameters.description: Specifies the angles at which the shape is to start and end. The region between beginarcangle and endarcangle, with clockwise rotation, will not be drawn.

parameters.name: radiusy
parameters.label: Radiusy
parameters.description: X and Y radii of the Circle. For polygons, only the X radius is used.

parameters.name: softnessoffset
parameters.label: Softnessoffset
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: bgcolorb
parameters.label: Bgcolorb
parameters.description: Color to use for the background.

parameters.name: borderb
parameters.label: Borderb
parameters.description: Color to use for the border of the shape.

parameters.name: premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.label: Premultrgbbyalpha
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: softnesstype
parameters.label: Softnesstype
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: fillcolorb
parameters.label: Fillcolorb
parameters.description: Color to use for the fill of the shape.

examples.label: Configure Radiusx and Radiusy
examples.description: Common settings from 36 real Derivative examples
